title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Instructional Designer in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
